title: create a quantified resume using this job description Performs business support or technical work, using data organizing…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
create a quantified resume using this job description Performs business support or technical work, using data organizing and coordination skills.
Performs tasks based on established procedures.
In some areas, requires vocational training, certifications, licensures, or equivalent experience.
General Profile

Ability to perform analytical and operational processes.
Entry-level position with limited requirements for licenses, training, and certifications.
Applies experience and skills to complete assigned work.
Works within established procedures and practices.
Works with a close degree of supervision.
Functional Knowledge

Has basic skills in a range of processes, procedures and systems.
Business Expertise

Understanding of how best teams integrate and work together to achieve company goals.
Impacts a team, by example, through the quality service and information provided.
Follows standardized procedures and practices.
Receives close supervision and guidance.
For consistency, methods and tasks are described in detail.
Leadership

Has no supervisory responsibilities.
Problem Solving

Ability to problem solve, self-guided.
Has limited opportunity to exercise discretion.
Interpersonal Skills

Exchanges information and ideas effectively.
Responsibility Statements

Receives, processes, and ensures document classification are completed and transmitted to clients.
May require outbound correspondence from the client to be processed.
Receives documents from both electronic and hard copy forms for processing.
Sorts, images, documents, files, and archives by form type.
Identifies documents and their purpose; creating a database of information.Classifies documents based on contract requirements.
Captures information based on client requirements.
Verifies data from automated data extraction tools.
Ensures transmission of processed data to the appropriate next level.
Performs other duties as assigned.
Complies with all policies and standards

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
related to data privacy, security, and confidentiality.

Quantified Resume:

Summary:

Self-directed and analytical individual with a vocational training certificate and exceptional data organizing, sorting, and coordinating skills. Able to perform analytical and operational processes, applying experience and skills to achieve optimal results. Possesses basic skills in a range of processes, procedures, and systems. Excellent at exchanging information and ideas effectively, following standardized procedures and practices, and working within established procedures and practices.

Responsibility Statements:

- Successfully processed and transmitted over 200 classified documents to clients, ensuring compliance with all policies and standards related to data privacy, security, and confidentiality.
- Sorted, imaged, and filed 50 electronic and hard copy documents based on form type, identifying their purpose and creating a database of information to enable better tracking, archiving, and retrieval.
- Captured and verified data from automated data extraction tools to ensure accurate and up-to-date client information was available at all times.
- Classifed documents based on contract requirements for over 100 clients, demonstrating a deep understanding of how best teams integrate and work together to achieve company goals.
- Successfully processed 20 outbound correspondence requests from clients, creating a platform for effective and seamless communication between clients and the company.
- Ensured the transmission of processed data to the appropriate next level, contributing to a high level of customer satisfaction.
- Provided excellent quality service and information to team members, impacting the team by example, ultimately achieving company goals.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Sure, here's an improved version:

Summary:

I am a self-directed and analytical individual with exceptional data organizing, sorting, and coordinating skills. I have completed vocational training and possess a wide range of analytical and operational skills that enable me to perform my job duties effectively. I follow established procedures and practices while applying my experience and skills to achieve optimal results. My ability to exchange information and ideas effectively enables me to work well with team members and clients.

Responsibility Statements:

- Successfully processed and transmitted more than 200 classified documents to clients, ensuring compliance with all data privacy, security, and confidentiality policies and standards. My strong attention to detail ensured that all documents were processed accurately and efficiently.
- Sorted, imaged, and filed 50 electronic and hard copy documents based on form type, which resulted in an efficient method of tracking, archiving, and retrieving all necessary documents. My database of information ensured better organization and accessibility for the team.
- Captured and verified data from automated data extraction tools to ensure accurate and up-to-date client information was always available. My deep understanding of the systems and processes helped me to complete this task with exceptional accuracy.
- Successfully classified documents based on contract requirements for over 100 clients. My ability to work well with others allowed me to get the necessary information to complete this task in an efficient and effective manner.
- Processed 20 outbound correspondence requests from clients, which contributed to effective and seamless communication between clients and the company. My interpersonal skills allowed me to communicate effectively with clients and to prioritize their requests.
- Ensured the transmission of processed data to the appropriate next level, which contributed to a high level of customer satisfaction. My keen attention to detail allowed me to ensure that all data was accurate and that the transmission was seamless.
- Provided excellent quality service and information to team members, impacting the team by example, ultimately achieving company goals. My expertise and skills enabled me to contribute to the success of the team.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Sure! Here's an improved version of the resume that uses the STAR method:

Summary:

Result-driven and self-directed individual with vocational training, solid analytical, operational, data organizing, and coordination skills. I have basic skills in a range of processes, procedures, and systems. Through exceptional interpersonal skills, I exchange information and ideas professionally, follow standard procedures and practices to ensure compliance with company policies and standards.

Responsibility Statements:

Situation:  Our client's documentation process was inefficient and required a high degree of manual labor and manual data processing. 

Task:  My role as a business support specialist was to receive, classify, and transmit client documents, including outbound correspondence.

Action: 

- Received, processed, and ensured the classification of more than 200 documents for clients by sorting, imaging, and archiving the documents based on the form type. 
- Created a database of information by organizing and accurately identifying the documents and their purpose that resulted in better tracking, archiving, and retrieval system.
- Classified documents based on contract requirements for over 100 clients. 
- Captured and analyzed data from automated tools to verify client information and ensure compliance with client requirements. 
- Worked closely with different team members to ensure effective communication and coordination, which facilitated higher-quality service delivery. 
- Ensured seamless transmission of processed data by following established procedures and practices. 

Result: 

- Improved document processes by reducing manual data processing, which increased productivity by 30%. 
- Nurtured strong relationships with clients and teams by communicating effectively and delivering high-quality service. 
- Ensured the retrieval of the right documents with a 100% accuracy rate, improving the overall team performance and achieving the company's goals. 

Leadership: Demonstrated leadership skills by nurturing effective communication and maintaining stronger relationships with colleagues, clients, and stakeholders. 

Problem Solving: Leveraged analytical skills in problem-solving, using various automated tools to verify and capture client information to ensure compliance with client requirements.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Sure, here's an improved version of your resume using the STAR method and quantified metrics:

Summary:

Client relations specialist with extensive skills in managing customer inquiries, maintaining high accuracy levels and implementing risk-management practices. Proven ability to build and retain relationships with clients, driving sales growth and customer satisfaction.

Responsibility Statements:

Situation: As a client relations specialist, I was responsible for addressing customer inquiries about policies and billing, as well as managing documents and risk-management practices. 

Task: My objective was to ensure customers received high-quality service and to improve overall customer satisfaction.

Action: 

- Successfully managed moderate to complex inquiries, addressing various types of policies and billing inquiries from internal and external customers in an efficient and accurate manner, maintaining a 99.9% accuracy level. 
- Improved SLA adherence by 15% by effectively managing customer inquiries, ensuring all requests were addressed within the expected timeframe. 
- Maintained a 100% accuracy rate when retrieving the correct documents for customers, improving overall team performance, and achieving the company's goals.
- Reduced customer complaints by 25% through implementing standardized practices for risk management. 
- Developed and implemented process changes that improved customer satisfaction scores by 15% within the first quarter of implementation for Delta Dental Insurance.
- Built relationships with customers achieving a 90% customer retention rate, increased sales revenue by 20%, and achieved a 15% increase in cross-selling financial products at Wells Fargo. 
- Increased sales by 20% during peak months at Ulta Beauty by building customer loyalty and rapport through the provision of exceptional customer service and relevant product knowledge.

Result: 

- Achieved high accuracy levels and managed customer inquiries efficiently, maintaining high satisfaction levels resulting in a 15% improvement in customer satisfaction scores.
- Successfully implemented best practices for risk management to reduce customer complaints by 25% while ensuring regulatory compliance.
- Built strong relationships with clients, achieving a 90% retention rate while driving sales growth and cross-selling financial products.
- Increased sales by 20%, and built customer loyalty and rapport, providing exceptional customer service and relevant product knowledge during peak months.

Leadership: Utilized strong leadership and communication skills to create and implement standardized practices for risk management and customer service, resulting in improved customer satisfaction scores. 

Problem Solving: Leverage organizational and analytical skills to resolve complex customer inquiries efficiently, contributing to a high customer satisfaction rate.
